vocab.context_meaning: 不、禁止（用于否定句中，表示对某行为的禁止，如禁止上传机密信息）
examples: Users are advised not to rely solely on AI-generated outputs for critical decisions.
It is not permitted to upload confidential documents to this AI platform without authorization.

vocab.context_meaning: 机密的（指不应被公开或输入AI模型的敏感信息，如个人资料或专有业务数据）
examples: Employees must not enter confidential client information into any AI-powered tool.
The platform's terms of use strictly prohibit the submission of confidential data.

vocab.context_meaning: 生成；（指人工智能模型）产生或输出文本、图像等内容
examples: This AI system can generate detailed responses to user queries within seconds.
The model was designed to generate outputs based on patterns found in its training data.

vocab.context_meaning: 输出（指AI模型处理后所产生的结果，可能包含不准确、有害或不当的内容）
examples: The output of an AI model can sometimes reflect biases present in its training data.
Users should critically evaluate any output produced by the model before acting on it.

vocab.context_meaning: 使用；指用户与AI模型进行交互的行为，该行为会被记录以用于安全目的
examples: Your use of the AI model is monitored to ensure compliance with the platform's security policies.
Continued use of this system implies that you accept the terms regarding data logging.

vocab.context_meaning: 信息；指不应上传的机密内容，特指敏感或私密的资料
examples: Do not upload any confidential information to the AI system without authorization.
The platform warns users to protect sensitive information when interacting with the model.

vocab.context_meaning: 造成的（指由AI模型的回应或输出所引发或导致的后果）
examples: The organization is not liable for any damage caused by the model's generated responses.
Users must be aware of the potential risks caused by harmful or biased AI outputs.

vocab.context_meaning: 被允许的；指经过正式授权或批准的行为
examples: Uploading sensitive information is only permitted when the platform has given clear authorization.
Users are not permitted to share confidential data with the AI model under standard terms.

vocab.context_meaning: 回应（指AI模型根据复杂算法和机器学习技术所生成的文字或内容输出）
examples: The AI model's response may not always be accurate and should be carefully reviewed.
Every response generated by the system is based on patterns learned during training.

vocab.context_meaning: 基于；以……为依据；指人工智能的运作以特定算法或数据为基础
examples: The AI generates its answers based on patterns learned during its training process.
Decisions based on AI outputs should always be cross-checked with reliable sources.

vocab.context_meaning: 请（用于礼貌地提示或要求用户遵守特定的使用规范或限制）
examples: Please review the terms and conditions before testing the AI model.
Please be aware that all interactions with this system are logged for security purposes.

vocab.context_meaning: 有偏见的；带有偏差的（指人工智能模型的输出可能因训练数据不均衡而产生不公正或片面的内容）
examples: The model's recommendations were biased toward certain demographics due to imbalanced training data.
Developers must audit AI systems regularly to ensure that generated content is not biased or discriminatory.

vocab.context_meaning: 是；为（系动词，与情态动词连用，描述人工智能输出内容可能呈现的状态或性质）
examples: AI-generated content can be misleading if the underlying model has not been properly validated.
Outputs produced by the system may be incorrect and should not be used as professional advice.

vocab.context_meaning: 响应；人工智能模型根据用户输入所产生的回复或反馈内容
examples: The AI's responses may sometimes be inaccurate or misleading, so users should verify the information.
Users are advised to evaluate the AI's responses critically before acting on them.

vocab.context_meaning: 是；系动词，用于陈述某一事实或状态，此处说明用户的使用行为正在被记录
examples: Your activity is recorded every time you interact with the AI model.
Access to this system is monitored for security and auditing purposes.

vocab.context_meaning: 那些（指代前文提到的人工智能模型所生成的回应和输出内容）
examples: The model generates outputs, and those outputs should always be reviewed for accuracy.
AI responses were analyzed, and those containing harmful content were flagged immediately.

vocab.context_meaning: 技术；方法（指用于构建和训练人工智能模型的专业方法或算法手段）
examples: Advanced techniques in neural networks have significantly improved AI response quality.
Researchers apply various training techniques to reduce bias in AI-generated outputs.

vocab.context_meaning: 明确地；指经过清晰、正式的授权或许可，没有任何歧义
examples: You may only upload personal data if you have been expressly granted permission by the platform.
The terms of service expressly prohibit the submission of confidential documents to the AI.

vocab.context_meaning: 你的；指使用者本人的行为或活动，此处特指用户对该AI模型的使用行为
examples: Your interactions with the AI model may be recorded for security and compliance purposes.
Be aware that your use of this platform is subject to monitoring and logging.

vocab.context_meaning: 输出（结果）；人工智能模型处理后所产生的结果，如文本、数据或图像
examples: The outputs of this AI model should be reviewed carefully as they may contain harmful content.
AI outputs can vary significantly depending on the complexity of the input provided.

vocab.context_meaning: （人工智能）模型；经过训练以处理输入并生成响应或输出的计算系统
examples: AI models are trained on large datasets to generate human-like responses.
Some AI models may produce inaccurate or biased outputs depending on their training data.

vocab.context_meaning: 上传（指将文件或数据提交至AI模型系统，用户被警告不得上传机密或个人资料）
examples: Never upload confidential business documents to an AI model without proper authorization.
Users who upload personal data to the system do so at their own risk.

vocab.context_meaning: 伤害（指AI模型的回应或输出可能对用户造成的负面影响或损害）
examples: The user accepts responsibility for any harm caused by inaccurate or biased AI outputs.
AI-generated content has the potential to cause harm if it is indecent or misleading.

vocab.context_meaning: 除非；表示在没有满足特定条件的情况下，某行为不应发生
examples: Do not share confidential files with the model unless you have been explicitly authorized to do so.
Users should avoid inputting sensitive information unless the platform expressly allows it.

vocab.context_meaning: 复杂的；指由许多相互关联的部分组成、难以理解或分析的算法或系统
examples: The AI relies on complex algorithms that are difficult for the average user to interpret.
Training an AI model involves solving complex mathematical problems at a massive scale.

vocab.context_meaning: 被记录的；指用户的使用行为被系统自动追踪和储存，以用于安全目的
examples: All interactions with the AI model are logged to detect and prevent unauthorized access.
Users should be aware that their queries are logged for security and audit trail purposes.

vocab.context_meaning: 个人的；指与特定个人相关的私人数据或资料
examples: Users are advised not to submit personal details such as their name or address to the AI model.
Sharing personal information with an AI system may expose you to privacy risks.

vocab.context_meaning: 不准确的；有误的（指人工智能模型生成的回应或输出内容可能与事实不符）
examples: The AI's response was inaccurate because it was based on outdated training data.
Users should verify any information provided by the model, as it may be inaccurate.

vocab.context_meaning: 算法；人工智能用于处理数据、学习规律并生成输出的一套数学规则或计算程序
examples: The AI's algorithms analyze user input and predict the most relevant response.
Biases in AI outputs often stem from flaws embedded within the underlying algorithms.

vocab.context_meaning: 有害的（指人工智能模型的输出内容可能对用户或他人造成伤害或负面影响）
examples: Users are warned that AI-generated content could be harmful if taken out of context.
The platform has safeguards in place to reduce the risk of harmful outputs from the model.

vocab.context_meaning: 和；并且；用于连接并列的词语、短语或从句
examples: The AI model generates responses and outputs that may not always be reliable.
Users must read and accept the terms before testing the AI model.

vocab.context_meaning: 学习（指机器学习，一种使人工智能模型通过数据训练自动改进的技术）
examples: Machine learning enables AI systems to improve their performance over time.
The model relies on deep learning algorithms to understand and generate human language.

vocab.context_meaning: 在……基础上；依据；用于表示某事物以另一事物为支撑或依据
examples: The model operates on a set of advanced machine learning algorithms.
Its recommendations are based on data collected from millions of previous interactions.

vocab.context_meaning: 任何（用于强调所有可能的风险或信息类型，不加限制）
examples: You assume the risk of any harm that may result from using this AI system.
Do not upload any files that contain sensitive or restricted information.

vocab.context_meaning: 人工智能；指能够执行学习、推理和生成内容等任务的计算机系统或模型
examples: AI is transforming the way we interact with technology by automating complex tasks.
The risks associated with AI include generating biased or harmful outputs.

vocab.context_meaning: 或；或者（用于连接并列的可能性，表示人工智能生成的内容可能存在的多种风险类型）
examples: The AI output may be misleading or potentially harmful to certain users.
Generated content could be biased or inaccurate depending on the training data used.

vocab.context_meaning: 机器（指执行复杂计算或数据处理任务的计算系统，如人工智能模型）
examples: The machine processes vast amounts of data to generate accurate responses.
This AI system is powered by a sophisticated machine that learns from user inputs.

vocab.context_meaning: （助动词）用于构成否定祈使句，在此语境中用于强调禁止用户上传机密信息的指令）
examples: Do not share any personal data with the AI model unless you have explicit authorization.
Do not assume that the model's responses are fully accurate or free from bias.

vocab.context_meaning: 数据；指个人相关的数字化信息，需受到保护，未经明确许可不得上传
examples: Personal data should never be uploaded to an AI model unless you have received explicit permission.
The system is designed to handle data securely to protect user privacy.

vocab.context_meaning: 可能（情态动词，表示人工智能的输出存在不准确、有害或带有偏见的可能性）
examples: AI-generated responses may not always reflect factual or up-to-date information.
The output may contain unintended bias depending on the data the model was trained on.
